parameters.name: group
parameters.label: Group
parameters.description: If there are input groups, specifying a group name in this field will cause this to act only upon the group specified.

parameters.name: usedistanceattr
parameters.label: Use Distance Attribute
parameters.description: Enables extrusion distance to be driven by an attribute.

parameters.name: distanceattr
parameters.label: Distance Attribute
parameters.description: The attribute to use to set the extrude distance.

parameters.name: inset
parameters.label: Inset
parameters.description: Applies a scaling factor to extruded geometry.

parameters.name: keepconnected
parameters.label: Keep Faces Connected
parameters.description: When on, faces are extruded as a group instead of individually. Useful in particular when extruding an input group.

parameters.name: maxprimsperpoint
parameters.label: Max Primitives per Point
parameters.description: Used to allocate temporary storage when Keep Faces Connected is on, it should be set to the maximum number a primitives a point can be a part of in the input geometry.

parameters.name: cpureadback
parameters.label: Copy Topology Info Back to CPU
parameters.description: Enable copying the point count and topology information held on the to the CPU.

parameters.name: bypass
parameters.label: Bypass
parameters.description: Pass through the first input to the output unchanged.

parameters.name: freeextragpumem
parameters.label: Free Extra GPU Memory
parameters.description: Free memory that has accumulated when output memory has grown and shrunk.

parameters.name: delinputattrs
parameters.label: Delete Input Attributes
parameters.description: Only output which attributes you specify in this helps isolate attributes into a separate branch.

examples.label: Configure axis
examples.description: Common settings from 4 real Derivative examples
